articles.title: UAE condemns Iranian attacks in Gulf states
articles.summary: UAE condemns Iranian attacks in Gulf states The Foreign Ministry of the United Arab Emirates issued a statement condemning Iranian attacks in Bahrain, Kuwait and Jordan.  "The United Arab Emirates has condemned in the strongest terms the renewed hostile attacks by Iran targeting the Kingdom of Bahrain, the State of Kuwait, and the Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan with drones and missiles," the statement said.
